title: Stupid Mario Bros 3 Remastered
description:
Commentary now available https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZloCtNPzrIo

The third and final episode of Stupid Mario Bros remastered in better video / audio quality 'n stuff for Mario's 25th anniversary. This is actually the only one I can watch without thinking 'oh god this isn't very good' which is probably why it was the only one I put on YouTube before today. But that old version is really terrible quality, and while the frame rate still chugs a bit here (stupid Camtasia) it's a noticeable improvement.

That's all for today, now I hope I've motivated you all to go off and buy Mario All Stars for your Wii. Actually, don't do that, it's really not worth paying so much for a single SNES rom and half-arsed extras.

More Stupid Marioz:
Stupid Mario Bros 1 http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wgn4HolVA_Q
Stupid Mario Bros 2 http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ce28u304niY
